set.name: SMB
set.longname: Magic the Gathering | Super Mario Brothers

card.name: Clash of Light and Dark
card.text: Exile all creatures and all creatures cards from all graveyards. Each player chooses and puts half of the cards they own exiled this way onto the battlefield, rounded up.

card.name: King K. Rool
Maker Pigeon
card.text: Flying When this creature enters or leaves the battlefield, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Guard Broggy
card.text: Vigilance {1}, Sacrifice this creature: Destroy target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: Magic Shades Moe-Eye
card.text: Whenever this creature becomes tapped, you gain 1 life and scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom of your library.)

card.name: Poplin Supporters
card.text: When this creature enters, create a Super token attached to target creature you control. (It's a colorless Aura enchantment token with enchant creature and "Enchanted creature gets +1/+1.")

card.name: Superstar Baby
card.text: During your turn, this creature has first strike. When this creature enters, draw a card.

card.name: Hint Toad
card.text: When this creature enters, return target enchantment card in your graveyard or Aura card with stock you own in exile to your hand.

card.name: Twirling-Hair Heroine
card.text: During your turn, this creature has flying. Whenever this creature attacks, another target attacking Hero or Noble you control gets +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Bouncy Hoppo
card.text: When this creature enters, choose one — • Tap target creature you don't control and put two stun counters on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.) • Destroy target artifact or enchantment you don't control.

card.name: Toad Tea Time
card.text: Enchant creature As long as another player controls enchanted creature, it can't attack or block. Otherwise, enchanted creature gets +2/+2

card.name: Lip Lock
card.text: Lip Lock deals 4 damage to target attacking or blocking creature. You gain life equal to the excess damage dealt this way.

card.name: Matrimonial Rejection
card.text: Exile target artifact or enchantment. Draw a card.

card.name: Whistletop Train
card.text: Lifelink When this Vehicle enters, if it was cast, each player chooses a creature they control, then sacrifices the rest. Crew 3 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 3 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Geno Whirl
card.text: Destroy target tapped nonland permanent. Its owner draws a card unless that permament dealt damage to you this turn.

card.name: Gold Leaf
card.text: Whenever an enchanted creature you control dies, return that creature to the battlefield tapped. Then if that creature had two or more Auras attached to it, return one of those Auras from your graveyard to the battlefield attached to that creature.

card.name: Sand Bird
Moo Moo Meadows Cow
card.text: First strike, lifelink Whenever this creature crews a Vehicle, that Vehicle gains first strike and lifelink until end of turn. Whenever you gain life for the first time each turn, clear a stage. (Draw a card, then discard a card. Every third stage you clear, you clear a world, draw a card and create a Treasure token instead.)

card.name: Koopa Paratroopa
card.text: Flying Whenever another Minion or Noble you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Tanuki Shopkeepers
card.text: Lifelink When this creature enters, you and target opponent each draw a card. If that player controls more lands than you, create a Treasure token. {4}{W}: You and target opponent each draw a card. If that player controls more lands than you, create a Treasure token.

card.name: Friendly Pachyderm Mount
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, tap all artifacts and creatures you don't control.

card.name: Sparkling Ego
card.text: Target creature you control gains hexproof, indestructible, and lifelink until end of turn. Draw a card.

card.name: Chic Sizeshifter
card.text: This creature can't be blocked as long as you control another attacking Hero or Noble. {3}{U}: This creature has base power and toughness 3/1 until end of turn.

card.name: Friendly Dolphin
card.text: Vigilance Whenever an enchantment you control enters, clear a stage (Draw a card, then discard a card. Every third stage you clear, you clear a world, draw a card and create a Treasure token instead.)

card.name: Porcupuffer
card.text: Flash This creature enters tapped.

card.name: Yoofoe Ship
card.text: Flying Expendable 2 (When this creature dies, create a 2/2 black Minion creature token with "This token can't block.")

card.name: Radical Failure
card.text: Counter target spell. That spell's controller puts a stun counter on a creature they control. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)

card.name: Poochy's Hint Art
card.text: Draw two cards, then clear a stage. (Draw a card, then discard a card. Every third stage you clear, you clear a world, draw a card and create a Treasure token instead.)

card.name: Mini Mushroom
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets -10/-0 and loses all abilities. (This includes abilities gained by other Auras already on it. It can gain abilities from new Auras.)

card.name: Spiny Shell Crashout
card.text: Target artifact or creature's controller puts it on their choice of the top or bottom of their library. Scry 1.

card.name: Spray Away
card.text: Choose one — • Return target creature to its owner's hand. • Target creature you control gets +0/+2 and gains hexproof until end of turn. Untap it.

card.name: Capture Companion
card.text: Enchant creature You control enchanted creature. Stock (You may cast a copy of this spell from your graveyard by exiling this card in addition to its other costs.)

card.name: Belome, Long-Tongued Demon
card.text: Vigilance Whenever you cast a legendary creature spell, copy that spell, except it isn't legendary. (A copy of a permanent spell enters as a token.)

card.name: The Ice Vellumental
card.text: The Ice Vellumental enters tapped with two stun counters on it. Whenever you remove a stun counter from The Ice Vellumental, tap target creature you don't control and put a stun counter on it.

card.name: Frog Suit
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature is a Frog in addition to its other types and can't be blocked. Stock (You may cast a copy of this spell from your graveyard by exiling this card in addition to its other costs.)

card.name: Warp Cannons
card.text: When this artifact enters, surveil 2, then clear a stage. (Draw a card, then discard a card. Every third stage you clear, you clear a world, draw a card and create a Treasure token instead.) {2}, {T}: Clear a stage.

card.name: Whirly Gecko
card.text: Deathtouch {5}{B}: Each opponent loses 2 life.

card.name: Mischievous Bandits
card.text: When this creature enters, each opponent discards a card and loses 1 life. You gain 1 life. Pay 1 life: This creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Kritter Kommando
card.text: When this creature dies, choose one — • Create a 2/2 black Minion creature token with "This token can't block." • Create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Cantankerous Elder
card.text: When this creature enters, target creature you control gets +1/+0 and gains indestructible until end of turn. (Damage and effects that say "destroy" don't destroy it.) {B}, Discard this card, Pay 1 life: Surveil 1, then draw a card. (To surveil 1, look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Insightful Ghost
card.text: Flying When this creature enters or dies, clear a stage. (Draw a card, then discard a card. Every third stage you clear, you clear a world, draw a card and create a Treasure token instead.)

card.name: Assaulting Phantamanta
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, target creature an opponent controls gets -2/-2 until end of turn. If that creature is enchanted, it gets -5/-5 until end of turn instead.

card.name: Polterpup's Assistance
card.text: Flash Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+0. When enchanted creature dies, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control and create a Treasure token.

card.name: Ghost Guess
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Draw two cards, then create a 1/1 black Minion creature token with "This token can't block."

card.name: Cackletta's Intrusion
card.text: Choose one — • Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it. That player discards that card. • Target creature you control gets +2/+0 and gains lifelink and deathtouch until end of turn.

card.name: Bowser's Big Suck
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if you control a Noble. Exile target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Grasp of the River Twygz
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature card in your graveyard. Target creature gets -5/-5 until end of turn. If that creature would die this turn, exile it and each Aura attached to it instead.

card.name: Ashley, Young Witch
card.text: Whenever an opponent discards their first card during each of your turns, you may pay 1 life. If you do, draw a card. {1}{B}, {T}, Sacrifice another creature: Target opponent discards a card and loses 2 life. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Tatanga, Mysterious Spaceman
card.text: Flying, lifelink Other nontoken creatures you control have expendable 1. (When that creature you control dies, create a 1/1 black Minion creature token with "This token can't block." If a creature has multiple instances of expendable, each triggers separately.)

card.name: Kleptomaniac Condor
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, exile target card from an opponent's graveyard. If it has mana value 1 or less, you may cast it without paying its mana cost. If that spell would be put into its owner's graveyard, exile it instead.

card.name: Poisonous Mushroom
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+0 and has deathtouch. Stock (You may cast a copy of this spell from your graveyard by exiling this card in addition to its other costs.)

card.name: Tox Box
card.text: Flash When this artifact enters, target creature you control gets +2/+0 and gains indestructible until end of turn. {2}{B}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn.

card.name: Fire Bro
card.text: When this creature enters, it deals 2 damage to target player or planeswalker.

card.name: Quick-Arrival Jaxi
card.text: Haste {T}: Another target creature gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Rescue Squad Chief
card.text: When this creature enters, clear a stage. (Draw a card, then discard a card. Every third stage you clear, you clear a world, draw a card and create a Treasure token instead.) Whenever you clear a world, target creature can't block this turn.

card.name: Real Funky Dude
card.text: Menace When this creature enters, create a Treasure token and exile the top card of your library. You may play that card until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Gobblegut Gargantua
card.text: Flying Expendable 3 (When this creature dies, create a 3/3 black Minion creature token with "This token can't block.")

card.name: Thunderhand
card.text: Thunderhand deals 2 damage to any target. Create a Super token attached to up to one target creature you control. (It's a colorless Aura enchantment token with enchant creature and "Enchanted creature gets +1/+1.")

card.name: Gold Block Dash
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature you control gets +2/+2 and gains "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, create a Treasure token." (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Flowery Advice
card.text: Enchant creature you control When this Aura enters or leaves the battlefield, clear a stage. (Draw a card, then discard a card. Every third stage you clear, you clear a world, draw a card and create a Treasure token instead.) Enchanted creature gets +1/+0 and has menace and "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, create a Treasure token."

card.name: Hammer Assault
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target artifact. • Destroy target creature with defender. • One, two, or three target creatures can't block this turn.

card.name: Bros Ball Training
card.text: When this enchantment enters, it deals 4 damage to target creature an opponent controls. {1}, Sacrifice this enchantment: Creatures you control gain haste until end of turn.

card.name: Fire Vellumental's Glory
card.text: Fire Vellumental's Glory deals 6 damage to target creature or planeswalker. If that permanent would die this turn, exile it instead.

card.name: Birdo, Egg Bombardier
card.text: Menace Whenever Birdo deals combat damage to an opponent for the first time each turn, untap another target creature you control. There's an additional combat phase after this phase.

card.name: Lakithunder, Lakitu Boss
card.text: Flying Ward—Pay 3 life. (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays 3 life.) Whenever another artifact, Minion, or Noble you control enters, Lakithunder deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Deflecting Spin
card.text: Choose one — • Deflecting Spin deals 3 damage to target creature. • Change the target of target spell or ability with a single target.

card.name: Karter's Focus
card.text: Enchant creature or Vehicle you control Enchanted permanent has menace. When this Aura enters and whenever enchanted permanent becomes tapped, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Bowser's Fire Hazard
card.text: Bowser's Fire Hazard deals 2 damage to each creature except for Minions and Nobles.

card.name: Ecstatic Steam Gardener
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, you may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Beanie Swarm
card.text: Expendable 1 (When this creature dies, create a 1/1 black Minion creature token with "This token can't block.") {3}{G}: Search your library for a card named Beanie Swarm, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Hungry Maw-Maw
card.text: Trample When this creature enters, you gain 2 life.

card.name: Scuttlebug
card.text: Reach Expendable 1 (When this creature dies, create a 1/1 black Minion creature token with "This token can't block.")

card.name: Lumbering Gorilla
card.text: Trample When this creature enters, create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Tropical Wiggler
card.text: Reach When this creature dies, clear a stage. (Draw a card, then discard a card. Every third stage you clear, you clear a world, draw a card and create a Treasure token instead.)

card.name: Sunnycide Egg
card.text: This creature can't be blocked by more than one creature. When this creature dies, return up to one other non-Egg creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Sandmaargh
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature or token or pay {3}. Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.)

card.name: Big Baby Yoshi
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast if you control a Hero or Noble. Trample When this creature enters, you draw a card and create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Piranha Plant Parade
card.text: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Clear a stage. (Draw a card, then discard a card. Every third stage you clear, you clear a world, draw a card and create a Treasure token instead.)

card.name: Into the Portrait
card.text: Look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal an Aura, Hero, Noble, or land card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Kong Elder
card.text: Vigilance Kong Elder can't attack or block unless you control three or more other creatures. Whenever you cast a creature spell, surveil 1. The first time you put a land card into your graveyard this way each turn, put it onto the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Cruise the Bean Stalk
card.text: This spell can't be countered Put any number of land cards from your hand and/or graveyard onto the battlefield tapped. When you do, target creature you control has base power and toughness each equal to the number of lands you control until end of turn.

card.name: Gutsy Galoomba
card.text: {1}{G}: This creature gains indestructible until end of turn. Tap it.

card.name: Blue and Yellow, Elite Toads
card.text: Trample Whenever an enchantment is put into your graveyard from the battlefield, put a +1/+1 counter on Blue and Yellow.

card.name: Peewee Piranha, Temperamental
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each Minion and/or Noble creature you control and each Minion and/or Noble creature card in your graveyard. Haste Pewee Piranha can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.

card.name: Potted Uproot
card.text: Reach Whenever another Minion or Noble you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. When a Noble you control enters, you may have this creature deals damage equal to its power to up to one target creature with flying. Do this only once each turn.

card.name: Luigi Logic
card.text: Look at the top X cards of your library, where X is the greatest power among creatures you control. You may put a land card from among them onto the battlefield tapped, then you may reveal a creature or land card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Motley Bossblob
card.text: When Motley Bossblob enters, each opponent loses 3 life and you gain 3 life. When Motley Bossblob dies, create six 1/1 black Minion creature tokens with "This token can't block." You can cast this spell from your graveyard by paying {W}{W}{B}{B} and sacrificing six Minions instead of paying its mana cost.

card.name: Smithy, Factory Tyrant
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each different name among artifacts you control and artifact cards in your graveyard. When Smithy enters, you may put an artifact card from your hand or graveyard onto the battlefield with a finality counter on it. That artifact becomes a 3/3 Minion creature in addition to its other types and gains haste.

card.name: Dealer Luigi
card.text: Vigilance If you would draw a card except the first one you draw in each of your draw steps, draw two cards instead. Whenever you clear a world, put a chip counter on Dealer Luigi, then create a Treasure token for each chip counter on him.

card.name: Paper Princess Peach
card.text: Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.) When Paper Princess Peach enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, each player draws a card. If an opponent has more cards in hand than you, you gain 2 life.

card.name: Torpedo Ted
card.text: Flying, haste Whenever another artifact you control enters, if it doesn't share a name with another artifact you control or an artifact card in your graveyard, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Chincho Swarm
card.text: Menace Whenever this creature attacks, another target attacking Minion or Noble gains lifelink until end of turn.

card.name: Blooper Nanny
card.text: Expendable 1 (When this creature dies, create a 1/1 black Minion creature token with "This token can't block.") Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, create a 1/1 black Minion creature token with "This token can't block."

card.name: Machine Made Replica
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, you may shuffle up to two cards from your graveyard into your library.

card.name: Ghost Portrificationizer
card.text: {1}, {T}: Scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom of your library.) {6}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Destroy target nonland permanent. If that permanent is a Spirit, exile it instead.

card.name: Beanbean Machine
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. {2}, {T}: Untap another target permanent you control.

card.name: Farsight Binoculars
card.text: When this artifact enters, you may search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. {6}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw two cards, then discard a card.

card.name: Huey, Paint Pal
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. When you use this mana to cast a multicolored spell, you gain 1 life for each of its colors beyond the first. Exhaust — {W}{U}{B}{R}{G}, {T}: Put two +1/+1 counters on Huey, then you draw two cards and gain 2 life. Huey becomes all colors. (Activate each exhaust ability only once.)

card.name: Slippery Banana Peel
card.text: When this artifact enters, tap target permanent. If it's a Vehicle, put a stun counter on it. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Welcome to the Party
card.text: Enchant creature you control. When this Aura enters, gain control of target creature until end of turn. Untap that creature. It gains haste until end of turn. Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has haste.

card.name: Bone Piranha Plant
card.text: Reach, deathtouch Whenever another creature you control dies, target opponent loses 1 life. If this is the third time that player lost life this way this turn, they discard a card.

card.name: Culex 3D
card.text: Flying When Culex 3D enters, you draw X cards and each player loses X life, where X is the number of enchantments you control. Whenever Culex deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice a white enchantment, a blue enchantment, a black enchantment, a red enchantment, and a green enchantment. If you do, that player loses the game.

card.name: Rainbow Road
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast a Hero, Pilot, or Vehicle spell. {W}{U}{B}{R}{G}, {T}: Put two +1/+1 counters on target Hero, Pilot, or Vehicle. It gains trample until end of turn. If it's a Vehicle, it becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.

card.name: Bob-omb Buddy
card.text: Lifelink When this creature enters, another target creature you control gains lifelink until end of turn.

card.name: Whacka Bump
card.text: Flash When this artifact enters, target creature you control gets +1/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Starlow, Guiding Voice
card.text: Flying At the beginning of your end step, if an Aura entered under your control this turn, you scry 1 and gain 1 life.

card.name: Jump Up, Super Star!
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature you control gets +2/+2 and gains flying until end of turn. • Return target Aura card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield attached to target creature. • Destroy target creature with power 4 or greater.

card.name: Toad House Assistant
card.text: Vigilance Aura spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: Cat Mario
card.text: First strike Whenever Cat Mario attacks, create a 1/1 white Cat Hero creature token with vigilance that's attacking. If Cat Mario is enchanted, that token gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Koops, Timid Turtle
card.text: Koops enters with a shield counter on him. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.) Exhaust — {6}{W}: Put a +1/+1 counter and two shield counters on Koops. (Activate each exhaust ability only once.)

card.name: Pipe Cork
card.text: Enchant basic land you control When this Aura enters, exile target creature or artifact an opponent controls until this Aura leaves the battlefield. Enchanted land has "{T}: Scry 1."

card.name: Parakarry, Mailman
card.text: Flying Parakarry enters with a shield counter on him. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.) Whenever Parakarry attacks, another target attacking creature and up to one other attacking legendary creature gain flying until end of turn.

card.name: Racetrack Lakitu
card.text: Flash Flying When this creature enters, return target creature you control to its owner's hand.

card.name: Dr. Mario
card.text: Lifelink When Dr. Mario enters, you may choose one — • Exile another target creature you control. At the beginning of the next end step, return it to the battlefield. • Exile target creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard. At the beginning of the next end step, put it onto the battlefield.

card.name: Swordfighter Peach
card.text: First strike When Swordfighter Peach enters, you may put an Aura or Equipment card from your hand or graveyard onto the battlefield. Equipment you control have equip {1}.

card.name: End of Sammer's Kingdom
card.text: Destroy all nonland permanents. You may return up to one Hero card in your graveyard destroyed this way to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Nimble Ninji
card.text: This creature can't be blocked. {6}{U}, Sacrifice this creature: Draw two cards.

card.name: Walbrick Shieldmate
card.text: Defender As long as a Minion or Noble entered the battlefield under your control this turn, this creature can attack as though it didn't have defender.

card.name: Sidestepper
card.text: Vigilance {4}{U}, {T}: Clear a stage. (Draw a card, then discard a card. Every third stage you clear, you clear a world, draw a card and create a Treasure token instead.)

card.name: Camera Lakitu
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, look at the top three cards of your library. Put them back on top in any order, then draw a card.

card.name: Thought Peek
card.text: Tap up to one target creature you don't control. Surveil 1, then draw a card. (To surveil 1, look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Goombella, Archaeology Student
card.text: Whenever Goombella or another Hero or Noble you control enter, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) {2}{U}, Exile three cards from your graveyard: Draw two cards, then discard a card.

card.name: Magic Whistle
card.text: Target creature you control can't be blocked this turn. Clear a stage. (Draw a card, then discard a card. Every third stage you clear, you clear a world, draw a card and create a Treasure token instead.)

card.name: Cape Mario
card.text: Flash Flying Cape Mario enters tapped. You may cast spells targeting Cape Mario as though they had flash.

card.name: Cheep Cheep
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, target creature gets -2/-0 until end of turn. {1}{U}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a 1/1 black Minion creature token with "This token can't block."

card.name: Helpful Water Dragon
card.text: Flash Affinity for enchantments (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each enchantment you control.) This creature enters tapped. When this creature enters, you and creatures you control gain hexproof until end of turn.

card.name: Penguin Mario
card.text: Whenever one or more creatures your opponents control become tapped, if they aren't being declared as attackers, put a stun counter on each of those creatures. {2}{U}, Remove three stun counters from among permanents you don't control: Draw two cards.

card.name: Aggressive Maw-Ray
card.text: Flash Whenever this creature enters or attacks, clear a stage, then put a +1/+1 counter on it for each card you've drawn this turn. (Draw a card, then discard a card. Every third stage you clear, you clear a world, draw a card and create a Treasure token instead.)

card.name: Comet Observatory
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control a legendary creature. {T}: Add {U}. Exhaust — {4}{U}, {T}: One or two target creatures you control each get +1/+1 and gain flying until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery. (Activate each exhaust ability only once.)

card.name: Koopa Troopa
card.text: This creature enters tapped. Expendable 2 (When this creature dies, create a 2/2 black Minion creature token with "This token can't block.")

card.name: Swoops Swarm
card.text: Flying, lifelink When this creature enters, it deals 1 damage to any target. If that target was dealt damage this turn, this creature deals 3 damage to it instead.

card.name: Dry Bones
card.text: This creature can't block. {4}{B}: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each Minion and/or Noble you control.

card.name: Ms. Mowz, Flirty Thief
card.text: Ms. Mowz can't be blocked by creatures with greater power. Kiss Thief — When Ms. Mowz enters, target opponent exiles a card from their hand. For as long as that card remains exiled, you may play it and you may spend mana as though it was mana of any color to cast it.

card.name: Skeleton Mario
card.text: Deathtouch Whenever Skeleton Mario deals combat damage to a player, you lose 1 life and clear a stage. (Draw a card, then discard a card. Every third stage you clear, you clear a world, draw a card and create a Treasure token instead.) Whenever you clear a world, each opponent loses 3 life.

card.name: Waluigi, Rude Racer
card.text: Menace Whenever Walugi becomes tapped, up to one target creature or Vehicle you control gets +2/+0 until end of turn. If you targeted Waluigi or a Vehicle this way, you lose 1 life and create a tapped Treasure token.

card.name: Bowser's Clown Car
card.text: Flying, menace When Bowser's Clown Car enters, create Junior's Clown Car, a 3/3 legendary black Vehicle artifact creature token with flying and crew 2. Whenever one or more creatures you control deals combat damage to a player, that player loses half their life, rounded up. Crew 3

card.name: Cosmic Mario
card.text: Indestructible Whenever Cosmic Mario deals combat damage to a player, each opponent may sacrifice a legendary creature. Each opponent who doesn't loses half their life, rounded up. {2}{B}, Sacrifice another legendary creature: Cosmic Mario can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Mad Piano
card.text: Menace Whenever a source deals damage to this creature, that source's controller loses that much life.

card.name: King Boo
card.text: Flying When King Boo enters, create X 1/1 black Spirit Minion creature tokens with flying and "This token can't block", where X is the number of different names among creature cards in your graveyard. {1}{B}, Sacrifice a Minion: You draw a card and each player loses 2 life.

card.name: Fire Piranha
card.text: Reach {2}{R}: This creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn. If mana from a Treasure was spent to activate this ability, create a Treasure token.

card.name: Monty Mole
card.text: Haste This creature can't be blocked by creatures with flying. Expendable 1 (When this creature dies, create a 1/1 black Minion creature token with "This token can't block.")

card.name: Shy Guy
card.text: {T}: Add {R}. Spend this mana only to cast a Minion or Noble spell or activate abilities of Minion or Noble sources.

card.name: Bob-omb
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, put a fuse counter on it. Then you may sacrifice this creature. When this creature dies, it deals damage equal to the number of fuse counters on it to target opponent.

card.name: Bob-ombs Away!!
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Bob-ombs Away!! deals damage equal to the sacrificed creature's power divided as you choose among one or two targets.

card.name: Fire Flower
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+0 and has first strike. Stock (You may cast a copy of this spell from your graveyard by exiling this card in addition to its other costs.)

card.name: Goombario, Mario's Friend
card.text: When Goombario enters, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card. Charge — {2}{R}: Goombario gets +2/+0 until end of turn. Multibonk — {1}{R}: Goombaria gains double strike until end of turn.

card.name: Woolly Sniffit
card.text: Reach Whenever an opponent casts a spell with one or more targets, this creature deals 2 damage to that player.

card.name: Coin Coffer
card.text: Menace Whenever this creature is dealt damage, create that many tapped Treasure tokens. (They're artifacts with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Bombette, Bombastic Starlet
card.text: When Bombette enters or is sacrificed, destroy up to one target artifact or nonbasic land. If a nonbasic land was destroyed this way, its controller may search their library for a basic land, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. {2}{R}{R}: Sacrifice Bombette.

card.name: Dancer Mario
card.text: Ward—Pay 5 life. Whenever one or more Heroes and/or Nobles you control deal combat damage to a player, exile the top card of your library. You may play those cards until your next combat.

card.name: March of the Minis
card.text: For each creature you control, create a token that's a copy of that creature except it's a 1/1 Toy artifact in addition to its other types, it has haste, and it isn't legendary. At the beginning of your next end step, sacrifice each of those tokens.

card.name: Bullet Bill Blaster
card.text: Whenever you attack, for each opponent, create a 1/1 red Construct Minion artifact creature token with flying and "At the beginning of your end step, sacrifice this token" that's tapped and attacking that player.

card.name: Strong-Arm Chuckster
card.text: {2}{R}, {T}, Sacrifice another creature: The sacrificed creature deals damage equal to its power to target creature or planeswalker you don't control. If excess damage is dealt this way, create a Treasure token.

card.name: Unchained Chomp
card.text: Haste Whenever a Minion or Noble you control attacks, it deals 1 damage to the player or permanent it's attacking. At the beginning of your end step, sacrifice this creature.

card.name: Smithy's Stolen Keep
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control a legendary creature. {T}: Add {R}. Exhaust — {4}{R}, {T}: Create a token that's a copy of target artifact or creature you control except it has haste and "At the beginning of your end step, sacrifice this token." Activate only as a sorcery. (Activate each exhaust ability only once.)

card.name: Back Alley Rex
card.text: Haste When this creature enters, creatures you control gain trample and get +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the number of Treasures you control plus the number of Treasures you've sacrificed this turn.

card.name: Goomba Stomp
card.text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control. If the creature you control is an enchantment or is enchanted, excess damage is dealt to that creature's controller instead.

card.name: Yoshi Tongue
card.text: Flash Enchant creature When this Aura enters, untap enchanted creature. Draw a card if there is another Aura attached to enchanted creature. Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has reach.

card.name: Patrolling Goomba
card.text: When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on another target Minion or Noble you control.

card.name: Luigi, Frightened Vacuumeer
card.text: Vigilance When Luigi enters, for each player, choose up to one target permanent card in that player's graveyard. Return a card in your graveyard chose this way to your hand, then exile all other cards chosen this way.

card.name: Mega Mushroom
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +4/+4 and has trample. Stock (You may cast a copy of this spell from your graveyard by exiling this card in addition to its other costs.)

card.name: Elephant Mario
card.text: Trample Whenever Elephant Mario deals combat damage to a player, surveil 1, then draw a card. If he's enchanted, surveil 3, then draw a card instead.

card.name: Yoshi's Island
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control a legendary creature. {T}: Add {G}. Exhaust — {4}{G}, {T}: Choose a creature with the least toughness among creatures you control. Put X +1/+1 counters on it, where X is the greatest toughness among creatures you control. (Activate each exhaust ability only once.)

card.name: Gooigi Canister
card.text: You may have this creature enter as a copy of another creature you control except it isn't legendary, it's an Ooze in addition to its other types, and it has "Other creatures you control that share a name with this creature have ward {2}."

card.name: Rock Mario
Twinkling Luma
card.text: Flying {1}: Add one mana of any color. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Standard Kart
card.text: Haste Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Maker Course
card.text: This land enters tapped. As it enters, choose a color. {T}: Add one mana of the last color chosen. {1}, {T}: Choose a color.

card.name: Boomerang Flower
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+0 and has double strike. Stock (You may cast a copy of this spell from your graveyard by exiling this card in addition to its other costs.)

card.name: Bowser Jr., Punk Prince
card.text: Trample When Bowser Jr enters, choose target creature or Vehicle card in your graveyard. If it's a Minion or Vehicle card with mana value 3 or less, you may return it to the battlefield. If a card isn't returned to the battlefield this way, return that card to your hand.

card.name: Captain Toad, Treasure Tracker
card.text: Captain Toad can't be blocked. When Captain Toad enters, clear a stage. (Draw a card, then discard a card. Every third stage you clear, you clear a world, draw a card and create a Treasure token instead.) Whenever you clear a world, put two +1/+1 counters on target creature.

card.name: Chargin' Chuck
card.text: Haste Other Minions and Nobles you control get +1/+0.

card.name: Coin Rush
card.text: Creatures you control have haste. Whenever one or more creatures you control deal combat damage to a player, create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Daisy, Tennis Ace
card.text: Reach Wonder Flower — Whenever Daisy attacks, choose target creature defending player controls, then choose one — • Tap that creature. • Untap that creature. It blocks this turn if able.

card.name: DK, Core Delver
card.text: Trample When DK enters, create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.") Whenever DK attacks, if you've sacrificed a token this turn, he gets +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Kammy Koopa, the Brains
card.text: Flash Flying When Kammy Koopa enters, counter target spell you don't control unless its controller pays {2}. If you control two or more other Minions and/or Nobles, counter that spell unless its controller pays {4} instead.

card.name: Ludwig Von Koopa, Composer
card.text: Ludwig Von Koopa's power is equal to the number of differently named artifacts you control. When Ludwig Von Koopa enters, create a colorless artifact token named Cannon with "{T}: This token deals 1 damage to each opponent."

card.name: Merlee's Luck Spell
card.text: Draw two cards, then discard a card. You gain 2 life.

card.name: Pauline, New Donk Mayor
card.text: Vigilance Whenever you draw your second card each turn, create a 1/1 white Citizen creature token. {6}, {T}: Creatures you control get +1/+1 and gain flying until end of turn. Activate only during your turn.

card.name: Princess Shroob, the Younger
card.text: When Princes Shroob enters, create a 1/1 black Alien Minion creature token with "This token can't block." {BG}, Sacrifice another creature: Surveil 1. You may have Princess Shroob gain indestructible until end of tun. If you do, tap her.

card.name: Star Road Map
card.text: Whenever you attack, clear a stage. (Draw a card, then discard a card. Every third stage you clear, you clear a world, draw a card and create a Treasure token instead.) Whenever you clear a world, return target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Super Acorn
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 for each enchantment you control and has flying. Stock (You may cast a copy of this spell from your graveyard by exiling this card in addition to its other costs.)

card.name: Antasma, Evil Bat King
card.text: Flying, lifelink Whenever you draw a card, Antasma deals 1 damage to each opponent. They each mill two cards.

card.name: Count Bleck
card.text: Flying, vigilance If a card would be put into an opponent's graveyard from anywhere, exile it instead. Whenever Count Bleck attacks, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life and surveil 1. If there are eight or more cards in exile, each opponent loses 3 life and you gain 3 life and surveil 3 instead.

card.name: Fawful, Beanish Brainiac
card.text: Menace At the beginning of your end step, for each opponent that lost life this turn, exile the top card of that player's library. Until your next end step, you may play those cards and mana of any type can be spent to cast a spell this way. Pay 3 life: Add {C}. Spend this mana only to cast spells from exile.

card.name: Fury Bowser
card.text: Double strike, trample When Fury Bowser enters, each opponent sacrifices a creature with the greatest mana value among creatures they control. Repeat this process for artifacts and enchantments.

card.name: Goomboss, Grand Pooh-bah
card.text: Trample Whenever Goomboss is dealt damage, create that many 1/1 black Minion creature tokens with "This token can't block." Whenever a Minion you control dies, put a number of +1/+1 counters on Goomboss equal to that creature's power.

card.name: King Bob-omb
card.text: Whenever a source you control deals excess noncombat damage to a creature you don't control, put that many +1/+1 counters on King Bob-omb. When King Bob-omb dies, for each opponent, draw three cards unless that player has King Bob-omb deal damage equal to his power to them.

card.name: King Bowser, the Mighty
card.text: Whenever King Bowser or another nontoken Minion or Noble you control enters, amass Minion 2. (Put two +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. It's also a Minion. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Minion Army creature token first.) {W}{U}{B}{R}{G}: Put two +1/+1 counters on King Bowser, then each other Minion and Noble you control has base power equal to his power until end of turn.

card.name: Lady Bow, Boo Princess
card.text: Flying, double strike Outta Sight — Whenever Lady Bow deals combat damage to a player, exile up to one other target nonland permanent you control, then return it to the battlefield under your control.

card.name: Petey Piranha
card.text: Flying, trample When Petey Piranha enters, for each opponent, choose up to one target creature they control. Each other creature you control that's a Minion, Noble, and/or Plant deals damage equal to its power to each of those targets.

card.name: Rosalina, Cosmic Guardian
card.text: Flying Whenever you cast an enchantment spell, create a 1/1 colorless Star enchantment creature token with flying. If that spell is an Aura, draw a card. {3}{G}{W}{U}: Each creature token, enchantment creature, and enchanted creature you control gets +3/+3 and gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: Mechawiggler, New Donk Terror
card.text: Trample, haste Whenever Mechawiggler attacks, it fights up to one target creature defending player controls. Mechawiggler gets +X/+0, where X is the amount of damage dealt to it this turn.

card.name: Bowser's Kingdom
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control a legendary creature. {T}: Add {B}. Exhaust — {5}{B}, {T}: Create two X/X black Minion creature tokens with "This token can't block", where X is the greatest power among creature cards in your graveyard. Activate only as a sorcery. (Activate each exhaust ability only once.)

card.name: Toadette, Princess's Favored
card.text: When Toadette enters, create a 1/1 white Fungus Citizen creature token. Whenever one or more Auras you control are put into a graveyard from the battlefield, you gain 2 life and draw a card.

card.name: Tutankoopa, Pyramid Wizard
card.text: Whenever you gain life for the first time during each of your turns, create a 2/1 red Dog Minion artifact creature token. Whenever you lose life for the first time during each of your turns, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Dr. Goomba Tower
card.text: When this creature enters, draw a card. Whenever another creature you control enters, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Viral Outbreak
card.text: Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn. Its controller loses 2 life.

card.name: Question Mark Block
card.text: This artifact enters with three coin counters on it. {T}, Remove a coin counter from this artifact: Create a tapped Treasure token. Then if this artifact has no coin counters on it, sacrifice it and exile the top two cards of your library. You may play those cards until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Firebrand Mario
card.text: When Firebrand Mario enters, create a Super token attached to him. (It's a colorless Aura enchantment token with enchant creature and "Enchanted creature gets +1/+1.") Whenever Firebrand Mario deals combat damage to an opponent, you may sacrifice an Aura. If you do, destroy target artifact that player controls.

card.name: Baby Yoshi
card.text: {1}{G}: Exile one or two target permanent cards from a single graveyard. Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. {2}{G}{G}: Double the number of +1/+1 counters on this creature.

card.name: Super Mushroom
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has vigilance. Stock (You may cast a copy of this spell from your graveyard by exiling this card in addition to its other costs.)

card.name: Super Mario Bros
card.text: Flash Menace When Super Mario Bros enter, return any number of target Aura cards put into your graveyard or into exile from the battlefield this turn to the battlefield attached to them.

card.name: Raging Broozer
card.text: Menace When this creature enters, target opponent sacrifices a creature of their choice. If they didn't sacrifice a creature with mana value 2 or greater this way, they lose 2 life.

card.name: Delfino Plaza
card.text: ({T}: Add {G} or {U}.) This land enters tapped.

card.name: Dry Dry Desert
card.text: ({T}: Add {W} or {B}.) This land enters tapped.

card.name: Flame Pipe
card.text: ({T}: Add {B} or {R}.) This land enters tapped.

card.name: Ghost House
card.text: ({T}: Add {U} or {B}.) This land enters tapped.

card.name: Glitz Pit
card.text: ({T}: Add {R} or {G}.) This land enters tapped.

card.name: New Donk City Hall
card.text: ({T}: Add {W} or {U}.) This land enters tapped.

card.name: Pagoda Peak
card.text: ({T}: Add {U} or {R}.) This land enters tapped.

card.name: Spiky Palms
card.text: ({T}: Add {R} or {W}.) This land enters tapped.

card.name: Toad Town
card.text: ({T}: Add {G} or {W}.) This land enters tapped.

card.name: Vim Factory
card.text: ({T}: Add {B} or {G}.) This land enters tapped.

card.name: Junior's Clown Car SMB
card.text: Flying Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Minion SMB
card.text: This token can't block.

card.name: Minion SMB
card.text: This token can't block.

card.name: Minion SMB
card.text: This token can't block.

card.name: Spirit Minion SMB
card.text: Flying This token can't block.

card.name: Treasure SMB
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Treasure SMB
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Minion SMB
card.text: This token can't block.

card.name: Boom Boom, Henchturtle
card.text: First strike, trample When Boom Boom dies, create two 2/2 black Minion creature tokens with "This token can't block." Put a first strike counter on one of those tokens and a trample counter on the other.

card.name: Mr. I
card.text: Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.) Whenever this creature attacks while you control another Minion or Noble, you draw a card and lose 1 life.

card.name: Captured Glydon
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature attacks, it gains first strike until end of turn. If you've draw two or more cards this turn, it gains double strike until end of turn instead. (A creature with double strike deals first-strike and regular combat damage.)

card.name: Power Balloon
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has flying. Stock (You may cast a copy of this spell from your graveyard by exiling this card in addition to its other costs.)

card.name: Wart, Subcon Tyrant
card.text: Trample Whenever Wart attacks, defending player creates a Food token. (They're artifacts with "{2}, {T}: Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")

card.name: Toadsworth, Old Aide
card.text: Spells you cast that target a creature cost {2} less to cast. During your turn, Aura cards in your graveyard have stock. (You may cast a copy of an Aura card in your graveyard by exiling that card in addition to paying its other costs.)

card.name: Urban Stingbies
card.text: Flying, menace When this creature enters, create two 1/1 black Minion creature tokens with "This token can't block." Other attacking Minions you control get +1/+0 and have menace.

card.name: 1-Up
card.text: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield, then return up to one target Aura card from your graveyard to the battlefield attached to that creature. (If that Aura can't enchant that creature, it remains in the graveyard.)

card.name: Biddybuggy
card.text: Flying, vigilance When this Vehicle enters, you may pay {1}. If you do, create a 1/1 black Minion creature token with "This token can't block." Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Pirate King's Meditation
card.text: Shuffle your hand and graveyard into your library, then draw seven cards. You have no maximum hand size for the rest of the game. Exile Pirate King's Meditation.

card.name: I Spyglass
card.text: When this enchantment enters, create a Super token attached to target creature you control. (It's a colorless Aura enchantment token with enchant creature and "Enchanted creature gets +1/+1.") Whenever you attack, look at the top X cards of your library, where X is the number of permanents attached to creatures you control. Put one of those cards into your hand, then put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Witch's Brew
card.text: Kicker—Pay 3 life. (You may pay 3 life in addition to any other costs as you cast this spell.) Exile target creature with mana value 2 or less. If this spell was kicked, exile target creature with mana value 5 or less instead.

card.name: Shadow Clone Koopa
card.text: Whenever you draw your second card each turn, create a 1/1 black Minion creature token with "This token can't block." Tap two untapped Minions you control: Target creature can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Sushie, Romantic Cheep
card.text: When Sushie enters, each opponent returns a creature they control to its owner's hand. Whenever you draw your second card each turn, you may return another creature you control to its owner's hand.

card.name: Stolen Name
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature loses all abilities and becomes a Shade with no name and base power and toughness 0/2. (It loses all other creature types.) Scry 2.

card.name: Ride the Eelevator
card.text: Exile target creature you control and all permanents attached to that creature. At the beginning of the next end step, return that creature to the battlefield, then return each other card exiled this way to the battlefield attached to that creature.

card.name: Smelt Anew
card.text: Choose one— • Return target artifact card from your graveyard to your hand. • Until end of turn, target artifact or creature you control becomes a 4/4 Construct Minion artifact creature with expendable 2. (When that creature dies, create a 2/2 black Minion creature token with "This token can't block.")

card.name: Toxic Spew
card.text: All creatures get -2/-2 until end of turn. Each opponent sacrifices an Aura of their choice.

card.name: Garlic Breath
card.text: Target opponent discards two cards. Create a Super token attached to up to one target creature you control. (It's a colorless Aura enchantment token with enchant creature and "Enchanted creature gets +1/+1.")

card.name: Queen Jaydes's Blessing
card.text: This spell costs {3} less to cast if it targets a creature card put into your graveyard from the battlefield this turn. Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Bone Rattler
card.text: Flash Menace When this Vehicle enters, exile up to one target creature that was dealt damage this turn. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Towering Pokey
card.text: Reach This creature enters with twice X counters on it. This creature has expendable X, where X is its power. (When this creature dies, create a X/X black Minion creature token with "This token can't block.")

card.name: Yoshi Steed
card.text: When this creature enters, clear a stage. (Draw a card, then discard a card. Every third stage you clear, you clear a world, draw a card and create a Treasure token instead.) Whenever you clear a world, you gain 3 life.

card.name: Courier's Pets
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. {2}{G}, Sacrifice this creature: Destroy up to one target noncreature artifact or noncreature enchantment. Clear a stage. (Draw a card, then discard a card. Every third stage you clear, you clear a world, draw a card and create a Treasure token instead.)

card.name: Tiki Doom
card.text: This creature can't be blocked by more than one creature. {1}{G}, Sacrifice another artifact or creature: Each other creature you control can't be blocked by more than one creature this turn.

card.name: Find the Giant Seed
card.text: Whenever a land you control enters, put a seed counter on this enchantment. {6}{G}, Sacrifice this enchantment: Search your library for two land cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each seed counter on this enchantment.

card.name: Monkey Business
card.text: Choose one. If you cast this spell during your main phase, choose one or two instead. • Destroy target artifact. • Destroy target enchantment. • Create a Treasure token.

card.name: Roll Call
card.text: Clear a stage. (Draw a card, then discard a card. Every third stage you clear, you clear a world, draw a card and create a Treasure token instead.) Return up to two permanent cards from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Invasive Overgrowth
card.text: When this enchantment enters, each opponent sacrifices a creature with flying of their choice. You may play lands from your graveyard.

card.name: Mega Mechakoopa
card.text: When this creature enters, destroy target nonland permanent an opponent controls.

card.name: Pipe Frame Kart
card.text: During your turn, this Vehicle has first strike. Tap an untapped creature you control: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.

card.name: Rosalina's Storybook
card.text: When this artifact enters, create a 1/1 colorless Star enchantment creature token with flying. {5}, {T}: Draw a card. This ability costs {2} less to activate if you have one or fewer cards in hand.

card.name: Mario Circuit
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Return target artifact card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Get the Shine Sprites!
card.text: Whenever one or more creatures you control deal combat damage to a player, create X Treasure tokens, where X is the greatest power among those creatures. (They're artifacts with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Bowser Tug o' War
card.text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to each opponent and to each other creature. Whenever a creature you control dealt damage this way dies this turn, create a tapped Treasure token.

card.name: Madame Flurrie, Charming
card.text: Flying, vigilance Gale Force — When Madame Flurrie enters, for each Hero and/or Noble you control, exile target nonland permanent you don't control. Return those permanents to the battlefield under their owner's control at the beginning of their owner's next end step.

card.name: E. Gadd, Ghost Researcher
card.text: When E. Gadd enters, another target creature or Vehicle you control gains "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card" for as long as you control E. Gadd. {2}{U}, {T}: Target creature can't be blocked this turn. Scry 2. {1}{U}, Discard a card: Return E. Gadd to his owner's hand.

card.name: Funky Dorrie Aqua-Trikes
card.text: This Vehicle can't be blocked. When this Vehicle enters, draw two cards, then discard a card. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Punch
card.text: Create a Super token attached to target creature you control. When you do, it fights target creature you don't control. (A Super token is an Aura token with enchant creature and "Enchanted creature gets +1/+1.")

card.name: The Boss's Approach
card.text: Create a Super token attached to a creature you control, then destroy each creature with lesser power than that creature. (A Super token is a colorless Aura enchantment token with enchant creature and "Enchanted creature gets +1/+1.")

card.name: Fabled Passage
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Then if you control four or more lands, untap that land.

card.name: Monstro Town
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {2}, {T}, Discard a card: Draw a card. {2}, {T}: Target nontoken creature you control gains expendable 2 until end of turn. (When that creature dies, create a 2/2 black Minion creature token with "This token can't block.")

card.name: RoboBrood, Moon Mech
card.text: Reach, vigilance, trample Whenever RoboBrood deals combat damage to a player, create that many 1/1 black Minion creature tokens with "This token can't block."

card.name: Dark Vortex
card.text: Choose one— • Exile target creature. • Exile target spell. • Exile target player's graveyard. Draw a card.

card.name: Dark Star's Invigoration
card.text: Target opponent reveals card from the top of their library until they reveal a nonland card, they exile that card, then they shuffle. You may cast the exiled card without paying its mana cost. If you cast a spell with mana value 3 or less, copy it. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Corrupted Giga Bell
card.text: Enchant creature you control Enchanted creature gets +2/+2 and has trample. Whenever enchanted creature attacks, draw a card unless defending player sacrifices a nonland permanent of their choice.

card.name: Admiring the Mushrooms
card.text: When this enchantment enters, exile the top X cards of your library, where X is the number of Auras you control. For as long as those cards are exiled, you may play them on any turn where an enchanted creature you control attacked. Whenever an Aura you control enters, exile the top card of your library. For as long as that card is exiled, you may play it on any turn where an enchanted creature you control attacked.

card.name: The Majesty of Space
card.text: If you have fewer than seven cards in hand, draw a number of cards equal to the difference. If your life total is lower than your starting life total, it becomes equal to your starting life total. If you control fewer lands than the opponent who controls the most lands, create a number of Treasure tokens equal to the difference.

card.name: Mushroom Kingdom
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control a legendary creature. {T}: Add {W}. Exhaust — {4}{W}, {T}: Exile target Aura card from your graveyard, then create a token that's a copy of it. Activate only as a sorcery. (Activate each exhaust ability only once.)

card.name: Cat Hero SMB
card.text: Vigilance

card.name: Insect SMB
card.text: Flying

card.name: Super SMB
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+1.

card.name: Copy SMB
card.text: (This token can be used to represent a token that's a copy of a permanent.)

card.name: Food SMB
card.text: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Construct Minion SMB
card.text: Flying At the beginning of your end step, sacrifice this token.

card.name: Cannon SMB
card.text: {T}: This token deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Alien Minion SMB
card.text: This token can't block.

card.name: Star SMB
card.text: Flying

card.name: Crushing Whomp
card.text: Trample Whenever this creature attacks, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card. Expendable 2 (When this creature dies, create a 2/2 black Minion creature token with "This token can't block.")

card.name: Top Secret Area
card.text: Enchanted creatures you control have vigilance. Whenever a nontoken creature you control enters, draw a card and create a Super token attached to that creature. (A Super token is an Aura token with enchant creature and "Enchanted creature gets +1/+1.")

card.name: The Honey Queen
card.text: Flying, lifelink Other Insects you control get +1/+0 and have lifelink. If one or more tokens would be created under your control, those tokens plus that many 1/1 white Insect creature tokens with flying are created instead.

card.name: Wario, Greedy Antihero
card.text: Deathtouch Whenever Wario deals combat damage to a player, that player exiles the top card of their library. If a land card is exiled this way, create a Treasure token. Otherwise, during any turn you attacked with a Hero, you may cast that card.

card.name: Wonder Dragon
card.text: Flash Flying When this creature enters, you gain X life and draw half X cards, rounded down. Whenever an opponent casts their second spell each turn or draws their second card each turn, you gain 1 life and draw a card.

card.name: Captain Syrup, Black Sugar Bandit
card.text: Menace Whenever you attack, create a Treasure token. Then if Captain Syrup is attacking, you may sacrifice five Treasures. When you do, gain control of target artifact or creature defending player controls. Untap it.
